Gross value added per hour worked.label: Gross value added per hour worked
Gross value added per hour worked.subtitle: Estimated value added of goods and services produced per hour worked
Gross value added per hour worked.longDescription: This indicator shows labour productivity (gross value added per labour input) in £ per hour worked (official statistics in development), in the UK, for 2004 to 2023.

Gross value added per filled job.label: Gross value added per job filled
Gross value added per filled job.subtitle: Estimated value added of goods and services produced per job filled
Gross value added per filled job.longDescription: This indicator shows labour productivity (gross value added per labour input) in £ per job filled (official statistics in development), in the UK, for 2002 to 2023.
